title: World's Biggest Nickel Mine in Indonesia Told to Slash Output
summary: Indonesia has notified PT Weda Bay Nickel, the world's largest nickel mine, to drastically cut its ore production quota from 42 million tons in 2025 to 12 million tons in 2026 to boost global prices. title: Indonesian smelters cut production on lower nickel ore quota

title: Nickel Headed to $20,000 as Indonesia Limits Production, EV Demand Surges
summary: With Indonesia committing to flat 2026 production of 250–260 million tons and EV demand growing 6–7% annually, nickel fundamentals are strengthening to support prices near $20,000 per ton. The market enters 2026 with constructive fundamentals despite lingering analyst skepticism.

title: Indonesia navigates nickel market with output cuts, policy shifts
